note: Component-level visual-regression states for the P0.3 token composer (charter D2 'grammar = versioned component library'). Each state renders deterministically via <ComposerDemo state=… candidates/resolved/text=…/> (fixtures passed in so the component ships with no hardcoded UI strings). The dual-capture rig (capture.mjs) screenshots BUILD once ComposerDemo is reachable behind a console dev/demo route (owned by ConsoleApp in P0.1 — this slice does not touch ConsoleApp); until then the three states are exercised by ComposerDemo.test.tsx. REFERENCE is the same dropdown/chip region in Oyatie Console.dc.html.

states.name: dropdown-open
states.describes: Candidate dropdown open below the field: person + object-link + code-link candidates, first row highlighted.

states.name: clamped-at-viewport-edge
states.describes: Dropdown pinned near the bottom viewport edge: flips above the caret and clamps its max-height (computeDropdownPosition), never clipping off-screen.

states.name: chip-render
states.describes: Stored token text rendered: @mention styling + #object-link chip + !code-link chip, with an unauthorized !CODE left as inert plain text (deny-by-omission).
